name: China Futex Holdings Limited
summary: China Futex Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of circular knitting machines in the People's Republic of China, India, South Korea, Bangladesh, Vietnam, and internationally. It manufactures and sells single and double circular knitting machines; and parts of circular knitting machines, as well as sells consumables and trades in circular knitting machines. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Longhai City, China.
